title: DH2 Roll VM (walking skeleton)
description: Seam-validation module: runs the dh2_roll_api DSL VM (engine + rules + data, the same bundle as the GitHub Pages build) inside Foundry. Primary target: dark-heresy-3rd-edition (Foundry v14); compat: dark-heresy-2nd (v12). See README.md for the validation checklist and tools/foundry-test/ for the automated smoke.
